posts.text:
The IPO market is about to make history:

Anthropic's pre-IPO stock, one of the most anticipated IPOs of all time, now has an implied market cap of $851 billion on Jupiter.

In October 2025, the value of a share of Anthropic's pre-IPO stock on Jupiter was as low as ~$122.

Just 7 months later, and these shares are up nearly +640%, to ~$900.

These pre-IPO shares are structured instruments backed 1:1 by SPV exposure, giving investors direct price exposure to Anthropic before the IPO launches, allowing the market to dictate potential valuation.

Between SpaceX's anticipated $1.7+ trillion IPO and both Anthropic and OpenAI targeting $1+ trillion, the IPO market is about to witness history.

The AI Revolution is accelerating.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Recently, our team was in Regina with Saskatchewan’s Minister of Energy and Resources celebrating an important milestone for Saskatchewan’s uranium sector following federal approvals for Denison’s Wheeler River Project and NexGen’s Arrow Project. 
 
The event provided an opportunity to share what this milestone means for Denison and the province. With early construction already underway at the Phoenix site, the Wheeler River Project is advancing toward becoming Canada’s first In Situ Recovery (ISR) uranium mine which is an notable innovation for the Canadian uranium industry. 
 
This milestone reflects Denison’s commitment to environmental stewardship, strong regulatory oversight, and building long term economic opportunities. 
 
Thank you to everyone who joined us in Regina and helped celebrate the milestone.
posts.author: quakes99
